questions.question: What is the main purpose of Notion Academy as described in the article?

options.explanation: The article does not mention sales of subscriptions; it focuses on learning.

options.text: To provide structured learning paths, lessons, and badges for Notion users
options.explanation: Correct – Notion Academy offers curated learning paths, lessons, and badge‑earning opportunities.

options.text: To host a marketplace for third‑party apps
options.explanation: The marketplace mentioned is for templates, not third‑party apps.

options.text: To replace the Notion Help Center entirely
options.explanation: The Help Center still exists for quick answers; Notion Academy complements it.

questions.question: How can a user earn badges through Notion Academy?

options.text: By completing any lesson, regardless of difficulty
options.explanation: Badges are tied to specific paths or lessons, not just any random lesson.

options.text: By completing curated learning paths at their own pace
options.explanation: Correct – the article states that completing a path or all its lessons earns a badge.

options.text: By purchasing a badge from the Notion Marketplace
options.explanation: Badges are earned through learning, not bought.

options.text: By attending a live webinar only
options.explanation: Webinars are supplemental; badges come from completing paths.

questions.question: Which of the following statements best describes the benefit of becoming a Notion Certified Admin?

options.text: It grants unlimited storage for personal Notion pages
options.explanation: Certification is about admin skills, not storage limits.

options.text: It validates your ability to run Notion at scale, implement security best practices, and be recognized across any company plan type
options.explanation: Correct – the article highlights scaling, security, and recognition as benefits.

options.text: It provides a discount on all Notion paid plans
options.explanation: No discount is mentioned in the article.

options.text: It allows you to create custom Notion themes
options.explanation: Theme creation is not part of the certification description.

questions.question: Which path is explicitly labeled for beginners?

options.explanation: The Advanced Path is for more experienced users.
The Essentials Path is described as for users new to Notion.
Workflows Path is labeled intermediate.
Custom Agents is a lesson, not a path.

questions.question: What is the primary focus of the lesson titled "An issue tracker for any team"?

options.text: Teaching how to create a personal journal in Notion
options.explanation: The lesson is about an intake system, not a personal journal.

options.text: Building an intake system using forms, charts, and automations
options.explanation: Correct – the description mentions building an intake system with those tools.
Marketplace design is a separate lesson.

options.text: Learning how to use AI for text generation
options.explanation: AI is referenced for the Workflows Path, not this specific lesson.

questions.question: Which lesson is categorized as "Advanced" and focuses on workspace design?

options.explanation: The article lists "Workspace design" as an Advanced lesson.
Building basics is a Beginner lesson.
Custom Agents is a Beginner lesson.
Templates & marketplace is Intermediate.

questions.question: How long is the "Templates & marketplace" lesson?

options.explanation: 20 minutes is the length of "Connecting knowledge in Notion".
30 minutes is the length of "Custom Agents".
Correct – the article lists the duration as 40 min.
15 minutes matches several beginner lessons, not this one.

questions.question: What primary benefit do "Custom Agents" provide to a Notion workspace?

options.text: They allow users to create custom visual themes
options.explanation: Theme creation is not mentioned as a function of Custom Agents.

options.text: They automate repeat work and reduce everyday busywork by running on schedules or triggers
options.explanation: Correct – the description highlights automation and busy‑work reduction.

options.text: They provide real‑time chat capabilities within Notion pages
options.explanation: Chat functionality is not described for Custom Agents.

options.text: They generate AI‑powered content for databases
options.explanation: AI‑generated content is not the core purpose of Custom Agents as described.

questions.question: Which path explicitly mentions the use of AI to help create connected systems?

options.explanation: Essentials Path focuses on basic skills, not AI.
The Workflows Path description includes "with the help of AI".
Advanced Path is about automation and architecture, but AI isn’t highlighted.
Custom Agents is a lesson, not a path, and AI isn’t mentioned.

questions.question: How many lessons are included in the Essentials Path?

options.explanation: The article lists "3 Lessons" for the Essentials Path.
Correct – the Essentials Path description states it contains 3 lessons.
Four lessons correspond to the Workflows Path.
Five lessons belong to the Advanced Path.
